title: Speedbridge Improvement Program
description: Speedbridge Improvement Program is a rhythm-based mod to help you speedbridge faster with tick perfect crouches, and frame perfect block placements.
body:
Speedbridge Improvement Program is a mod that helps you perfectly time your movements for a speedbridge to ensure that you have perfect timing and consistency.
Demo: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=K7Wi24v2kpY
Proof of consistency: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fnwSOBrSuVw

### Please note that this only works bridging straight at a 45 degree angle, as demonstrated in the video above. Diagonal bridging works, but the crouching notification appears instantly
